resources.string: Camera Samples Catalog
Gemini Multimodal Generation
A very simple example of multimodal generation using the Gemini Flash model.
Gemini Chatbot
A simple implementation of chatbot using Gemini Flash model.
Summarization with Gemini Nano
Summarize articles and conversations on-device with GenAI API powered by Gemini Nano
Image Description with Gemini Nano
Generate short descriptions of images on-device with GenAI API powered by Gemini Nano
Polish text with Gemini Nano
Proofread and rewrite short content on-device with GenAI API powered by Gemini Nano
Android Camera Samples
Android\nCamera Samples
Open sample
Image generation with Imagen
Generate images with Imagen, Google image generation model
Image Editing with Imagen
Generate images and edit only specific areas of a generated image with inpainting
Magic Selfie with Imagen and ML Kit
Change the background of your selfies with Imagen and the ML Kit Segmentation API
Video Summarization with Gemini and Firebase
"Generate a summary of a video (from a cloud URL or Youtube) with Gemini API powered by Firebase"
Video Metadata Creation with Gemini and Firebase
"Generate metadata of a video (from a cloud URL or Youtube) with Gemini API powered by Firebase"
Gemini Live API to-do
"Simple to-do app using the Gemini Live API to interact with the items in the list"
Chat with Nano Banana Pro
Conversational Image generation with Gemini 3 Pro Image
Gemini Hybrid
Inference with Firebase Hybrid SDK using either Gemini Nano on-device or Gemini Flash in the Cloud.
Firebase Required
This feature requires Firebase to be initialized.
Close
Show me how
